originalAlarm.description: Undefined or garbage value returned to caller

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_NETPOLL () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_IPV6 () Bool
  false)
reasoning: e39363a9def.c L17: 'return err' where err is uninitialized (// ERROR). When CONFIG_NETPOLL=T AND CONFIG_IPV6=F: the function goes to 'put' via 'goto put' at L13 without executing 'err = -1' at L9, so err is returned uninitialized. PC=CONFIG_NETPOLL=T AND CONFIG_IPV6=F is exactly the correct condition. Known bug. Correctly constrained PC (compare with TRANSFORMATION_68: TRUE_UNDER had an incorrect PC).
